meaning: adj.轻佻的,不受拘束的,小马似的
examples: Big shoes make me feel coltish.
I feel big to the shoe makes me coltish.
Me at five, dark spiky hair, moon pale with brown almost Slavic eyes, wiry, coltish.
But in 1999, when Blackwell first encountered her, she was just another coltish athlete, struggling to be noticed.
With a credible Maine accent, Sumner gives a coltish energy and appeal to Minnie, who appears to be a pleasant, unpolished young woman stuck in a bad marriage.
